zh.lifeSummary: 當Albreda de Lacy於1097年出生在英國越可爾時，她的父親Robert de Lacy Baron of Pontefract27歲，母親Mathilde de Perche22歲。她於1113年與Robert Lisours結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1166年在英國越可爾斯普洛特布盧 安德 庫斯沃斯享年69歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Albreda de Lacy于1097年出生在英国越可爾时，她的父亲Robert de Lacy Baron of Pontefract27岁，母亲Mathilde de Perche22岁。她于1113年与Robert Lisours结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1166年在英国越可爾斯普洛特布盧 安德 庫斯沃斯享年69岁。

nameMeanings.name: Lacy
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Irish (of Norman origin): habitational name from Lassy in Calvados, named from a Gaulish personal name Lascius (of uncertain origin and meaning) + the locative suffix -acum.

variants.name: Lasee
meanings: Probably an altered form of English or Irish   Lacy  .

variants.name: Lacey
meanings: English and Irish: variant of   Lacy  .

nameMeanings.name: Albreda
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Variant of   Elfreda  , but now probably taken as a feminine equivalent of   Alfred .

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Pet form of any of the given names beginning with the letter D- ( compare Jay and Kay ), in particular Dorothy . It is also used as an independent name, and may in some cases be associated with the River Dee ( compare Clyde ).

historicEvents.title: The Battle of Tichebray
historicEvents.description: King Henry I defeated and captured his brother, Robert of Normandy, at the Battle of Tinchebray in 1106. Robert remained in captivity until his death in 1134.

en.lifeSummary: When Albreda de Lacy was born in 1097, in Yorkshire, England, her father, Robert de Lacy Baron of Pontefract, was 27 and her mother, Mathilde de Perche, was 22. She married Robert Lisours in 1113. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. She died in 1166, in Sprotbrough and Cusworth, Yorkshire, England, at the age of 69.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Albreda de Lacy est née en 1097, à Everwyck, Angleterre, son père, Robert de Lacy Baron of Pontefract, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Mathilde de Perche, avait 22 ans. Elle a épousé Robert Lisours en 1113. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1166, à Sprotbrough and Cusworth, Everwyck, Angleterre, à l’âge de 69 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Albreda de Lacy 1097 in Yorkshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Robert de Lacy Baron of Pontefract 27 und ihre Mutter Mathilde de Perche 22. Sie hat 1113 Robert Lisours geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1166 im Alter von 69 Jahren in Sprotbrough and Cusworth, Yorkshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Albreda de Lacy è nata il nel 1097 nel Yorkshire, England, sua padre, Robert de Lacy Baron of Pontefract, aveva 27 anni e sua madre, Mathilde de Perche, aveva 22 anni. Lei sposato Robert Lisours nel 1113. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1166, nel Sprotbrough and Cusworth, Yorkshire, England, all'età di 69 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Albreda de Lacyが1097年にイギリスヨークシュアイアで生まれた時，父Robert de Lacy Baron of Pontefractは27歳，母Mathilde de Percheは22歳であった。1113年にRobert Lisoursと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1166年にイギリスヨークシュアイアスプロトブロウ アンド クウスウオルスで69歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Albreda de Lacy(이)가 1097년 영국 요르크실르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Robert de Lacy Baron of Pontefract(은)는 27세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Mathilde de Perche(은)는 22세였다. 그녀는 1113년 Robert Lisours(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1166년 영국 요르크실르 스프로트브루그h 앤드 커스워스에서 69세의 나이로 사망했다.

mn.Holton, Cheshire, England: Holton, Bro an Hañv, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Albreda de Lacy nasceu em 1097, em Yorkshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Robert de Lacy Baron of Pontefract, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Mathilde de Perche, tinha 22 anos. Ela casou-se com Robert Lisours em 1113. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 1166, em Sprotbrough and Cusworth, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, com 69 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Albreda de Lacy родилась в 1097 г. в местности еркшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Robert de Lacy Baron of Pontefract было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Mathilde de Perche, 22. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Robert Lisours в 1113 г. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1166 г. в местности спротброую анд кусворт, еркшир, Англия в возрасте 69 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Albreda de Lacy nació en 1097, en Yorkshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Robert de Lacy Baron of Pontefract, tenía 27 años y su mamá, Mathilde de Perche, tenía 22 años. Se casó con Robert Lisours en 1113. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija. Murió en 1166, en Sprotbrough and Cusworth, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 69 años.
